name: Novu
description: Monitor Novu notification infrastructure for environment separation and access compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Novu at https://web.novu.co
2. Go to Settings → API Keys
3. Copy your API Key
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Novu Settings → API Keys

checks.name: Separation of Environments
checks.description: Verifies Novu has separate environments for development and production notifications

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Novu team members and their access to notification infrastructure
